member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.Data.CloudCountriesTranslationData
member.summary: Cloud counterpart of the on-premise . Implements the same contract so consumers see an identical surface whether the data came from the cloud service or an on-premise pipeline. Populated by .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.Data.CloudCountriesTranslationData.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.AspectDataBase},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FlowElements.IAspectEngine)
member.summary: Construct a new instance.
member.param: The logger instance to use.
The Pipeline that created this data instance.
The engine that created this instance.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.Data.IpDataCloud
member.summary: A data class that makes working with IP data from cloud services easier for the user.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.Data.IpDataCloud.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.AspectDataBase},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FlowElements.IAspectEngine,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Services.IMissingPropertyService)
member.summary: Construct a new instance of the wrapper.
member.param: The logger instance to use.
The Pipeline that created this data instance.
The engine that create this data instance.
The to use if a requested property does not exist.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngine
member.summary: Cloud counterpart of the on-premise . Reads the already-computed country name translations from the cloud service response (the cloud runs the translation pipeline server-side) and exposes them through . Like , its property list is driven by the cloud metadata, so a resource key that does not grant the translation properties fails fast when the pipeline is built.
Constructor
member.param: The logger for this instance to use
Factory function to use when creating aspect data instances.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngine.ElementDataKey
member.summary: The key to use for storing this engine's data in a instance. Matches the on-premise CountriesTranslationEngine so the two are interchangeable.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngine.EvidenceKeyFilter
member.summary: The filter that defines the evidence that is used by this engine.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngine.ProcessCloudEngine(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData,FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.Data.CloudCountriesTranslationData,System.String)
member.summary:
Perform the processing for this engine: 1. Extract the "countrynamestranslated" section from the cloud JSON. 2. Deserialize it to populate a instance.
The base handles fetching the JSON from the , the missing-engine error and the empty-response (cloud request failed) case, then calls this method with the JSON.
member.param: The instance containing data for the current request.
The instance to populate.
The JSON response from the .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngine.GetPropertyType(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.PropertyMetaData,System.Type)
member.summary: Map a property's cloud meta-data type to the strongly-typed the data class exposes. The weighted translated lists arrive as "WeightedString" and the "All" lists arrive as "Array" (a plain list of strings).
member.param: The instance to translate.
The type of the object on which this property exists.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngineBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder used to create a cloud-based countries translation engine for IP intelligence country name translations.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngineBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: The factory to use when creating a logger.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngineBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build a new engine using the configured values.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.CloudCountriesTranslationEngineBuilder.NewEngine(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: This method is called by the base class to create a new instance.
member.param: A string list of the properties that the engine should populate.

member.summary: Create a default instance of this element's data.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngine
member.summary: Engine that takes the JSON response from the and uses it populate a IpDataCloud instance for easier consumption.
Constructor
member.param: The logger for this instance to use
Factory function to use when creating aspect data instances.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngine.ElementDataKey
member.summary: The key to use for storing this engine's data in a instance.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngine.EvidenceKeyFilter
member.summary: The filter that defines the evidence that is used by this engine. This engine needs no evidence as it works from the response from the .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngine.ProcessCloudEngine(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData,FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.Data.IpDataCloud,System.String)
member.summary:
Perform the processing for this engine: 1. Extract the "ip" section from the cloud JSON. 2. Deserialize it to populate a instance.
The base handles fetching the JSON from the , the missing-engine error and the empty-response (cloud request failed) case, then calls this method with the JSON.
member.param: The instance containing data for the current request.
The instance to populate with values.
The JSON response from the .
member.exception: Thrown if a required parameter is null

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngine.ToValueForAPV(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Convert value returned by cloud in json (weakly typed) to a value expected by AspectPropertyValue (strongly typed). Uses the IP-specific type converter for IPAddress and WktString.
member.param: Original value.
Target type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngine.GetPropertyType(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.PropertyMetaData,System.Type)
member.summary: Try to get the type of a property from the information returned by the cloud service. This should be overridden if anything other than simple types are required.
member.param: The instance to translate.
The type of the object on which this property exists.
member.returns: The type of the property determined from the Type field of propertyMetaData.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngineBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder used to create a cloud-based IP intelligence engine.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngineBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Constructor
member.param: The factory to use when creating a logger.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngineBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build a new engine using the configured values.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Cloud.FlowElements.IpiCloudEngineBuilder.NewEngine(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: This method is called by the base class to create a new instance before additional configuration is applied.
member.param: A string list of the properties that the engine should populate. In this case, this list is ignored as the resource key defines the properties that are returned by the cloud service.
